name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: ACA in jeopardy (again!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | | "Trump administration is trying to bring back pre-existing conditions." \- _Mic_ , 3/07/2018
---
This March, we're celebrating the Affordable Care Act's eighth anniversary.
Alongside President Obama, we made a promise to the American people: a pre-existing condition shouldn't bar you from receiving necessary care.
We also took an unprecedented step forward to insure millions of Americans, many for the first time. In addition, we slowed the rampantly rising costs of care and pushed insurers to cover essential health benefits like maternity and mental health coverage.
This month also marks the one-year anniversary of defeating the first version of Trumpcare. But our work isn't done. The Trump Administration is working behind the scenes to dismantle the ACA and weaken protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions.
[_**We need 8,888 signatures to protect the ACA and the progress we 've made before its eighth anniversary. Add your name and stand with me.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f9f/622b7b5b/19d3ba35/307b8f55/2578753798/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180314")
As a breast cancer survivor, I have a pre-existing condition. And there are millions of Americans just like me.
**We deserve to have access to the care we need.**
Before the ACA, insurers could refuse to cover someone for being a survivor. Or insurers would only offer coverage with astronomical copays and deductibles. In other words, if you had coverage, chances are you couldn't access it. And if you could, you struggled to afford it.
I don't want to return to a day and age where pre-existing conditions defined your ability to access care. I don't want to give insurers free reign to do as they please while millions suffer.
[_**We fought with everything we had to save the ACA last year. And we 're going to need to do the same against this latest threat. Sign your name if you're in >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f9f/622b7b5b/19d3ba35/307b8f55/2578753798/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180314")
| | [Sign your Name](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f9f/622b7b5b/19d3ba35/307b8f55/2578753798/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180314")
---
Thank you,
Debbie

name: Donna Edwards
subject: 100 days left - can I count on you?
body:
Entice the open with some amazing preheader text. Use a little mystery and get those subscribers to read through...
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff75/767134fb/5cba2b00/43382cdd/3554035904/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, First, I want to thank you for your support over the last several months of this campaign. I couldn't do any of this without you, and I am grateful for the people who believe in my vision for Prince George's County--one where the government is accountable to the needs of all its residents and there is a strong focus on our school system producing a workforce that is ready to succeed in a 21st century economy. We are only 100 days until the June 26th primary, and we need your help now more than ever. At the beginning of my run for County Executive, I made a promise that my campaign would be funded by grassroots supporters like you, not rich developers that don't have Prince George's County residents' best interests at heart.[ **I want to end corruption and the influence of big business in our county, and I can 't do that without you. Will you give $10 or more to my campaign today?**](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff75/767134fb/5cba2b00/43382cda/3554035904/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website") I want to reiterate that this election is about the future of Prince George's County. We've made great strides but stand at a critical crossroads that will determine success for our children, for our families, and for our economy in the years ahead. Now, with 100 days left before the primary election, I am asking for your support so that together, we can bring real change to Prince George's County. [**I cannot do this without you - I hope you will donate $10 or more today.**](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff75/767134fb/5cba2b00/43382cda/3554035904/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website") Developers don't determine the future of Prince George's County - you do.[**I hope you will join me and help me reach the finish line as we approach the primary election. **](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff75/767134fb/5cba2b00/43382cda/3554035904/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website") Thank you again for all your support, and for all the work you do. -Donna
---

BREAKING: Republican Rep. Mike Braun pumps millions into campaign! |

| | **BREAKING: Republican Rep. Mike Braun pumps millions into campaign!
[_Don 't let him drown out our voices. Pitch in to fight back and re-elect Joe!_](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c23f1/7377f838/30f242c8/51faf3fd/2868996013/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/braun-march?refcode=20180318nd&amount=10")** Peter -- It's time for you to meet one of the GOP front-runners, State Rep. Mike Braun, an extreme politician who could be _worth nearly $100 million_ \-- and he's contributed $3.2 million of that fortune to his own campaign. **And he 's already coming after Joe.**

Rep. Braun has been airing ads for months inflating his own record. But now he's trying to smear Joe's name and lying about Joe's record to confuse Hoosier voters. We can't let him get away with these nasty and downright false attacks. **Will you chip in to help us fight back against Rep. Braun 's baseless attacks?**

**Make no mistake Peter, Mitch McConnell would LOVE to have Rep. Braun in the Senate.** They both support the devastating Republican tax bill written for millionaires (like Braun!) and they both want to rip health care away from 400,000 Hoosiers. **If this guy gets elected, there 'll be no stopping McConnell and his allies like the Koch brothers from pushing through their extreme agenda!**

Look -- do we want another senator who just doesn't understand what Hoosier families are going through? Or do we want someone like Joe who gets our struggles because he _knows_ our struggles, who works hard and has proven time and again that he _always_ puts Indiana first?

If it's the latter, then we need you NOW -- before Rep. Team Donnelly
